title: Home
content: Welcome to Alliance Street Organic Farms — Goa's most trusted source for organic desi chicken, goat meat, farm-fresh eggs and goat milk. Every product is raised without antibiotics, hormones, or artificial chemicals.
metaTitle: Alliance Street Organic Farms — Pure. Honest. Always Fresh.
metaDescription: Premium organic desi chicken, goat meat, country eggs & goat milk raised in Goa, India. Zero antibiotics. Zero shortcuts. Order fresh.

title: About Us
content: Alliance Street Organic Farms was founded in 2024 with a single mission — to bring honestly raised, chemical-free food directly to Goan families. We raise native breeds in open pastures, free from antibiotics and artificial feed, and sell directly to consumers.
metaTitle: About Us | Alliance Street Organic Farms
metaDescription: Learn about Alliance Street Organic Farms — founded in Goa in 2024 to bring pure, ethical, antibiotic-free food directly to families.

title: Blog
content: Stories, insights and honest knowledge from our fields in Goa. We write about native breeds, organic farming practices, nutrition, and the truth about what you eat.
metaTitle: From the Farm — Blog | Alliance Street Organic Farms
metaDescription: Stories, insights and honest knowledge from Alliance Street Organic Farms in Goa — covering desi eggs, native breeds, goat milk and organic farming.

title: Products
content: Shop farm-fresh desi chicken, goat meat, country eggs and goat milk from Alliance Street Organic Farms, Goa. No antibiotics, no hormones — ever.
metaTitle: Our Products | Alliance Street Organic Farms
metaDescription: Shop farm-fresh desi chicken, goat meat, country eggs and goat milk from Alliance Street Organic Farms, Goa. No antibiotics, no hormones — ever.
